text:
A brand new episode of Percy Jackson and the Olympians has landed onDisney Plusthis week, with fans facing another wait for the next instalment.

Earlier this month,Season 2 of the popular show returned to the streaming platform, based on the second book in Rick Riordan's beloved best selling series 'The Sea Monsters'.

With "thrilling new monsters" and "higher stakes than ever",the young demigods embarked on another perilous questto save Camp Half Blood and their friend Grover.

As Percy Jackson and his friends find themselves on a new adventure into unchartered waters, fans have already witnessed plenty of action in the three episodes released so far.

But when will the next episodes be released, and how many are there? We've put together what you need to know about the remainder of the season.



Read more:Everything Percy Jackson season 2's Tyson star has been in before

Read more:Percy Jackson and the Olympians books in order as season 2 drops on Disney Plus

With the first two episodes premiering on Disney Plus on December 10, the streaming platform previously announced that episodes will then be released weekly, every Wednesday.

This means episode three was released on December 17, with fans having to wait until Wednesday, December 24 for episode 4.

In total, there will be eight episodes, meaning it will come to an end on January 21, 2026.



We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you've consented to and to improve our understanding of you. This may include adverts from us and 3rd parties based on our understanding. You can unsubscribe at any time. Read ourPrivacy Policy

With the brand new series, Disney Plus teased: "After Camp Half-Blood’s protective border is breached, Percy Jackson embarks on an epic odyssey into the Sea of Monsters in search of his best friend Grover and the one thing that may save the camp — the legendary Golden Fleece.

"With help from Annabeth, Clarisse and his newfound cyclops half-brother Tyson, Percy’s survival becomes essential to stopping Luke, the Titan Kronos, and their impending plan to bring down Camp Half-Blood — and ultimately, Olympus."

While Season 2 is airing, a third is already in production in Vancouver, Canada. However, no official release date has yet been confirmed.

Given the fact it is in production, fans will likely have a lengthy wait on their hands, but in line with the first two instalments, it could likely hit Disney Plus in December next year.

Season 3 will likely follow the order of the books and so will be adapted from the third book on the best selling series called The Titan's Curse.

The Titan's Curse follows Percy on a quest in a bid to rescue Annabeth and goddess Artemis as they face an impending war as well as a dangerous beast.

Percy Jackson and the Olympians can be streamed on Disney Plus

title: When does the rest of Percy Jackson and the Olympians come out? | TV & Radio | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Aaliyah Rugg
description: A brand new episode of Percy Jackson and the Olympians Season 2 has been released.
